name: Ozzie Cadena
abstract: Oscar "Ozzie" Cadena (September 26, 1924 – April 9, 2008) was an American record producer with Savoy Records and Prestige Records who recorded gospel and jazz music in the 1950s, 1960s and 1970s, and helped popularize jazz music in Los Angeles.

about_quotes.speaker: Kenny Clarke
about_quotes.evidence: So I called Ozzie Cadena right away and I said 2:00 o'clock tomorrow at Rudy Van Gelder's... we went out to Rudy Van Gelder's and made the first Cannonball date.

about_quotes.speaker: Rudy Van Gelder
about_quotes.evidence: The interviewee is Rudy Van Gelder. The interviewer mentions Ozzie Cadena and describes his work, but the interviewee does not speak or confirm any personal relationship with Ozzie Cadena in the provided text.
about_quotes.doc_title: Rudy Van Gelder — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
